ports.name: Positive Terminal
ports.note: Nut-and-bolt terminal — team attaches ring lugs. Physical gauge limit is whatever ring terminal fits on the bolt. FRC rules require 6AWG minimum on main power runs; that constraint lives in the rules engine.

ports.name: Negative Terminal
ports.note: Ground return path. Runs directly to PDH negative input — does not pass through the main breaker. Nut-and-bolt terminal, team-attached ring lug. FRC rules require 6AWG minimum.
